title: docs: update README — 2026-05-18
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the repository's front page with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file, refreshing the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most current community highlights and news.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot and a cute robot companion updating a wooden bulletin board with new pictures, representing the automated README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a monitor head and the bee mascot pinning new pixelated photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
